mnemonics: I Search For Min Max Nodes Daily (Insertion, Searching, Find Min, Find Max, Count Nodes)
keyPoints: Insertion adds new nodes while maintaining structure integrity
Searching traverses the structure to locate specific data
Finding Min/Max requires checking all nodes in linear structures or leveraging sorted properties in trees
Counting nodes requires traversal to accumulate a total
commonMistakes: Forgetting to update pointers/references during insertion
Assuming a structure is sorted when performing min/max operations
Not handling empty structure cases in count operations
